name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Bulk Pack of 20 - Reflex Cat Treats - Stick Treats, gain Free Salmon (3 Sticks x 5g) 15g
shortDescription: Reflex Cat Stick Treats with Salmon are? grain-free and made from delicious real meat . Carton of 20 Packs of 3 sticks. High-protein and low-fat. Reward good behaviour with these fun and delicious treats made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour.
description: Reflex Cat Stick Treats with Salmon are? grain-free and made from delicious real meat. These high-protein, low-fat stick treats promote healthy chewing. Reward good behaviour with these fun and delicious treats made with the highest quality ingredients and bursting with flavour. Carton of 20 Packs of 3 sticks. INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives, fish and fish derivatives (6% from salmon), minerals. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 33.5 Oil Content (%) - 20 Crude Ash (%) - 10 Crude Fiber (%) - 2 Moisture Content (%) 28 FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Treats may be given as an additional snack. For an average cat (4kg) we recommend approximately 1 stick per day. This product does not replace cat's daily food requirement.
